name: Rainbow Trout with Herb Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt over the inside and outside of the trout.
2. Heat 1/4 cup butter in a pan and toast bread cubes until brown. Stir often.
3. Add onions and cook until they begin to soften.
4. Stir in mushrooms, parsley, lemon juice, marjoram, and a dash of salt. Mix thoroughly.
5. Stuff the fish with this mixture.
6. Place the trout in a greased baking dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes.
